stages.name: SOURCES
stages.sub: content & config — nothing upstream of these

stages.name: CHECK
stages.sub: drift detectors and tests — run after generation

stages.name: OUTPUT
stages.sub: generated artifacts: dist, pages, index, sw

stages.name: RUNTIME
stages.sub: loaded by pages in the browser

nodes.role: system blueprint — canonical registry of all feature IDs, category IDs, template IDs
arc structure source — defines arc membership, ordering, and metadata
hand-transcribed structured extract of pages/org-blueprint.html's roster and patterns — the 'runnable kernel' that document names as its own unfinished ambition
loadedBy: pages/ecosystem-hub.html (live fetch, browser — the Council Lenses panel, added Session 022 same day as this note)
lib/build-roles.js (compiles this roster + data/status/*.json's lens fields into data/roles.json)

nodes.role: department registry source — production-domain grouping, orthogonal to arcs (narrative) and blueprint.json categories (publish lifecycle)
pre-built read index — the single artifact every page and build script reads from
loadedBy: lib/vextreme-index-v2.js (browser fetches via CDN, caches in localStorage)

nodes.role: content node source — the authoritative list of all content slugs
loadedBy: lib/build-index.js (primary consumer — reads on every build)

nodes.role: per-slug viewmodel overrides — demo/specimen pages that aren't content nodes
append-only continuity helper — appends a same-session continuation block at EOF without treating the VXG marker as an insertion anchor
applies config/content-intents.json's pending entries — mutates pages/*.html meta tags and data/arcs-v2.json's auto-managed sections, then runs the existing sanity-check pipeline
reads: pages/*.html (only the slugs named by pending intents)
writes: pages/*.html (meta tag upserts, only for slugs named by pending intents)

nodes.role: v1 Squarespace-era arc nav — DO NOT USE for God Script pages
reads: window.PAGE_ARCS (set per-page by the embedding loader)
loadedBy: lib/vextreme.js (v1 runtime — loadScript of /lib/arc-nav.js; squarespace-injection.html only loads vextreme.js)

nodes.role: page wiring auditor — read-only report of which pages/*.html are wired to a God Script, blocked, or intentionally skipped
reads: pages/*.html (checks for a dist/vextreme-{slug}.js script src)
loadedBy: CLAUDE.md (points here as the wiring-status source of truth)
lib/check-key-alignment.js (imports SKIP_PAGES + getPageSlugs — reuses the skip list instead of duplicating it)
lib/build-terrain-map.js (getPageSlugs — real page files vs. curated nodes.json entries, for the content/arc layer's uncurated column)

nodes.role: synthesizes a node-shaped object for any pages/*.html file with no data/nodes.json entry, so adding a page alone is enough to make it visible
writes: nothing — pure in-memory synthesis, never persisted to data/nodes.json
loadedBy: lib/build-archives.js (feeds the Unsorted section — see pe-011 for why this is two call sites, not one)

nodes.role: arc-chunked language bundle assembler — the od-001/td-006 pilot, opt-in per arc
writes: data/strings/compiled/arcs/{arcId}.{lang}.json (one per opted-in arc per language present)
data/strings/compiled/arcs/index.json (which arcs are chunked, their langs, key counts)

nodes.role: generates pages/archives.html — the complete page registry: every arc's slugs as ported/missing cells, plus unsorted and dev/demo pages
reads: pages/*.html (existence check, per slug, for the ported/missing cell state; also read in full via lib/auto-discover-nodes.js for any slug with no nodes.json entry)

nodes.role: generates pages/ecosystem-hub.html — the admin+AI-facing system state dashboard
generates index.html — the root landing page, arc hub links plus the 5 most recently added nodes
content pipeline assembler — reads source data, writes the single pre-built index everything reads from
reads: pages/*.html (via lib/auto-discover-nodes.js, for any slug with no nodes.json entry)
loadedBy: tests/08-build-vextreme.test.js (FAB SYSTEM propagation tests — calls buildViewmodel directly)

nodes.role: LATTICE header generator — reads this JSON, writes the matching in-file header into each eligible node's own file
writes: LATTICE:BEGIN..LATTICE:END block in every eligible node's own file

nodes.role: compiles config/lessons/*.json into data/lessons.json — the read-side manifest the Ecosystem Hub fetches
reads: config/lessons/*.json (every lesson file, both schema generations)
loadedBy: pages/ecosystem-hub.html (live fetch of the compiled output)

nodes.role: generates pages/roles-index.html — the traceable roles/contributions dashboard
compiles data/council-kernel.json's roster + data/status/*.json's lens fields into data/roles.json — the traceable roles/contributions registry
loadedBy: pages/roles-index.html (live fetch of its output data/roles.json — via lib/build-roles-page.js)

nodes.role: generates sitemap.xml — lists only pages that actually exist, so crawlers never hit a 404
reads: git log (per-file last-change date, via subprocess)

nodes.role: system health manifest assembler — reads hand-authored status/*.json plus the strings manifest and key-alignment report, writes data/status.json
reads: lib/ and widgets/ directory listings (.js files, for coverage denominator)
lib/check-key-alignment.js (checkKeyAlignment() — orphan pages, wip collisions/duplicate intents)
loadedBy: pages/ecosystem-hub.html (live fetch of its output data/status.json)

nodes.role: localization identity pilot, second script — generates pointer indexes and a human-readable report from committed identity metadata
reads: data/strings/source/pages/*.json (identity blocks + strings, for language listing)

nodes.role: Service Worker generator — reads dist/ filenames + arc-chunked bundle index, writes sw.js
terrain-map write side — computes layout, health, edges, and real screenshots into one deterministic JSON
reads: data/nodes.json (real page titles/arcKeys, for both the screens layer and the arcs/pages content layer)
data/arcs-v2.json (real arc priority/title, for the arcs/pages content layer's column order and labels)
lib/audit-pages.js (getPageSlugs — real page files vs. curated nodes.json entries, for the content layer's uncurated column and each page's live flag)
docs/screenshots/*.png (directory listing — which pages have a real per-language screenshot)

nodes.role: God Script assembler — reads index + string bundles, writes one self-contained dist/ file per page
reads: lib/vextreme-index-v2.js (arc-nav feature, via srcDir: LIB_DIR in FEATURES registry)

nodes.role: git-diffing orchestration for lib/compute-fab-version.js — finds the last VERSION-bump commit, diffs data files against it, applies the computed bump to widgets/fab-lang.js
reads: git log/show/diff history (via child_process, not require())
writes: widgets/fab-lang.js (rewrites the VERSION line in place, if a bump tier applies)
loadedBy: .github/workflows/build-index.yml ('Auto-increment fab-lang.js CDN version' step, before the artifact-commit step)

nodes.role: informational check comparing merged-PR count against how recently the newest continuity session file was touched
reads: active batch directory listing (newest session file, via lib/session-bootstrap.js's latestSessionFile)
git log (last commit touching the newest session file; commit range since then, via subprocess)
writes: stdout only — read-only, changes nothing; always exits 0 (informational)

nodes.role: non-blocking-in-spirit, blocking-in-practice check — every var(--token) reference in generated pages and stylesheets must resolve against a real token
reads: lib/build-*.js (every generator, scanned for inline <style> content)
pages/*.html (every static page, scanned for inline <style> content)
styles/*.css (every companion stylesheet, credited with global tokens unconditionally — see alwaysGlobal)
loadedBy: tests/13-check-design-tokens.test.js (also runs it as a CI-gating integration test)

nodes.role: non-blocking CI check — compares slug/arc keys across nodes.json, arcs-v2.json, index.json, cross-checks pages/ and wip/, and reports drift
reads: wip/*.html (filename-derived slug + title, via lib/auto-discover-nodes.js discoverWipDrafts)
lib/build-archives.js (source text — ARC_ORDER, ARC_KEY_MAP, regex-scanned not required)
lib/build-index-page.js (source text — its own separate ARC_ORDER, regex-scanned not required)
writes: stdout (JSON report with --json flag); PR comment via .github/workflows/key-alignment.yml
loadedBy: lib/apply-content-intents.js (validates department/arcKey against the same maps)

nodes.role: pe-012 lattice-edge drift detector — verifies the map's claimed reads/writes/loadedBy edges against actual code
reads: lib/, tests/, widgets/, components/ *.js sources (mention + require() scans)
any file a node names in reads/writes/loadedBy (existence + mention checks)
writes: stdout only — read-only; exit 1 only with --strict (not wired into CI)

nodes.role: pe-013 layered-maps drift detector — verifies the bindings between cold-start maps and the files they claim to bind
reads: docs/continuity/INDEX.md (batch registry, Active batch line, Last updated line)
writes: stdout only — read-only, changes nothing; exit code 1 on drift

nodes.role: localization identity pilot, third script — informational validator, never rewrites anything
writes: stdout only — read-only, changes nothing; always exits 0 (informational, matches pe-014's own prescribed start-soft sequencing)

nodes.role: pure semver classification for widgets/fab-lang.js's CDN cache-busting VERSION — major/minor/patch decision table + diff helpers, no I/O
self-scaling CI test-sharding — computes shard count and per-shard file assignment from the real current tests/*.test.js file count, no hand-picked number to forget updating
reads: tests/*.test.js (file list only, via fs.readdirSync — not file contents)
writes: stdout (matrix JSON via `matrix` command, newline-separated file paths via `files` command)
loadedBy: .github/workflows/test.yml ('shards' job computes the matrix; 'test' job's matrix jobs compute their own file list)

nodes.role: detects a wip/*.html → pages/*.html move within a PR's diff, so a promotion shows up as a positive PR notice instead of silence or a false 'broken reference'
reads: git diff --name-status -M output between two refs (wip/ and pages/ paths only)
writes: stdout (JSON with --json flag); PR comment via .github/workflows/key-alignment.yml

nodes.role: localization identity pilot, first script — proposal/report tool only, cross-references a page's string keys against its live HTML's data-legacy-id/id/title-alias attributes
event code registry — the CODES constant every logger.warn/error call references
structured logger — every build script's warn/info/error call goes through here
loadedBy: every other lib/build-*.js and lib/check-*.js script that logs a warning

nodes.role: runs the build scripts tests/helpers/prereqs.js declares as required before the test suite can read generated files — replaces a hardcoded run: line in .github/workflows/test.yml
writes: whatever each script in PREREQUISITE_SCRIPTS writes (currently data/strings/compiled/*, pages/archives.html) — this file only orchestrates, it has no output of its own

nodes.role: one-shot session-start state report — read-only, gathers what would otherwise be several manual checks into one command
reads: docs/continuity/batch-00N/ directory listing (newest YYYY-MM-DD-session-0NN.md file, when the active batch is a directory)
node --test tests/*.test.js (via subprocess, with VEX_BOOTSTRAP_NESTED=1 to prevent recursion)

nodes.role: strings pipeline integrity check — runs before compile, catches missing EN text, stale translations, and orphaned keys
writes: data/strings/source/**/*.json (in-place mutation: remap/delete keys, tag stale translations)
loadedBy: manual run: node lib/strings-check.js (intended to run before lib/strings-compile.js)

nodes.role: strings pipeline compiler — reads source JSON, writes compiled bundles and manifest
loadedBy: lib/build-vextreme.js (loads its output data/strings/compiled/scopes bundles for God Script assembly)
widgets/fab-lang.js (fetches its output data/strings/compiled/scopes bundles at runtime for JA)
lib/strings-check.js (reads its output data/strings/compiled/manifest.json for stale detection)

nodes.role: string reverse-tracer — data-i18n usage in pages/wip HTML cross-referenced against the compiled manifest
blueprint consistency validator — confirms every id in blueprint.json has a matching config file and vex-config constant
constants hub — pure declarations, no I/O
loadedBy: tests/08-build-vextreme.test.js (FAB SYSTEM propagation tests — reads Feature.* constants directly)

nodes.role: browser arc nav runtime — reads index.json at load time, renders prev/next/position into #arcNavMount
reads: window.VEX_STRINGS_EN (God Script fast path — already inlined by build-vextreme.js)
testedBy: tests/03-browser-nav.test.js (data logic; no browser render tests yet)

nodes.role: the terrain map's read side — a navigable health/dependency atlas, live-fetches data/terrain-map.json
loadedBy: manual browsing only — not embedded elsewhere yet

nodes.role: Service Worker — pre-caches all God Scripts and core assets at install
loadedBy: widgets/sw-register.js (registers this file in every God Script page)

nodes.role: browser language switcher FAB — fetches JA/ZH scope or arc bundles, applies [data-i18n] swaps
reads: window.VEX_STRING_ARC_BUNDLE (arc-chunked bundling pilot, checked before the scope path)
localStorage (LS_LANG — the selected language preference only, not fetched string content)
DOM: #vex-spiral-group (widgets/vex-fab.js — Session 025 FAB unification, nests its orb there if present)
location.search (?lang= param — explicit override for the effective language, wins over localStorage)
writes: location/history (history.replaceState — reflects the effective language into ?lang= so the current URL is always forwardable)
loadedBy: lib/build-vextreme.js (inlined as lang feature in God Scripts)
legacy pages via direct CDN script tag (pre-God-Script pattern)
testedBy: tests/08-build-vextreme.test.js (structural guard: loadSupportedLangs() must read window.VEX_SUPPORTED_LANGS)

nodes.role: orb linking to pages/terrain-map.html
loadedBy: lib/build-vextreme.js (inlined as map feature in God Scripts)

nodes.role: dark/light theme toggle orb — sets document.documentElement's data-theme attribute, persists to localStorage
loadedBy: lib/build-vextreme.js (inlined as theme feature in God Scripts)

nodes.role: Service Worker registration — activates offline caching, forces an immediate update check, auto-reloads once when a new SW takes control
writes: an immediate Service Worker update check on every page load (registration.update())
window.location.reload() — exactly once, when a new SW becomes the controller
loadedBy: lib/build-vextreme.js (inlined as core module in every God Script, default: true)
testedBy: tests/09-build-sw.test.js (BUILD-SW: widgets/sw-register.js auto-reloads once..., BUILD-SW: widgets/sw-register.js forces an immediate update check... — structural guards on this file directly; the rest of tests/09 tests sw.js generation)

nodes.role: spiral FAB — trigger button + shared expandable group container that other orb widgets mount into
loadedBy: lib/build-vextreme.js (inlined as spiral-fab feature in God Scripts, must be first among the FAB-group features)

debtTitles.td-002: Old widget filenames kept for backward compat
debtTitles.td-003: No HTML dead link scanner in CI
debtTitles.td-006: i18n per-scope-combo bundling does not scale to multiple languages — pilot resolved for one arc, full migration still pending
debtTitles.td-008: Current architecture has no structured-concurrency model — a known ceiling once server logic or multi-threaded application scope enters the ecosystem
debtTitles.od-010: Fractal expansion of the continuity/lessons memory pattern into per-department standing memory, plus an audit for other single-scope foundational structures never checked for the same expansion
debtTitles.od-009: Parallel/simultaneous instruction dispatch across multiple departments or orgs, instead of today's one-at-a-time processing
debtTitles.od-008: Staged/proposal execution for higher-blast-radius content-management gestures (consolidation, deletion, connector rewiring)
debtTitles.od-002: Should build-time content synthesis use a live LLM call, or stay session-authored?
debtTitles.od-003: Future: local/lightweight model as an admin-facing chat interface, escalating to Claude instances when needed
debtTitles.od-006: An 'init baseline' scaffold — separate the reusable engine from Vextreme's specific content, so a new project can fork the architecture without the content
debtTitles.od-007: Future, downstream of od-006: a cross-org discovery/relationship protocol between independent instances of this architecture
debtTitles.pe-002: Port remaining blocked pages to God Scripts
debtTitles.pe-004: Missing-key fallback: show EN text instead of raw key string
debtTitles.pe-005: strings-check: audit HTML for translatable elements missing data-i18n
debtTitles.pe-007: Unified feature registry — collapse CORE_MODULES and FEATURE_WIDGET into one table
debtTitles.pe-011: Collapse lib/build-archives.js onto data/index.json instead of re-deriving from nodes.json/arcs-v2.json independently
debtTitles.pe-014: Function-level reverse traversal map for answering source-of-truth questions with minimal grep
debtTitles.pe-010: Department dashboard depth — dedicated transcript library, God-Script wiring granularity
debtTitles.pe-009: Expand LATTICE coverage beyond the current 27 nodes (64% of lib/+widgets/)

arcs.name: UNSORTED
arcs.sub: curated pages with no arc yet

arcs.name: UNCURATED
arcs.sub: auto-discovered pages, no nodes.json entry yet

pages.title: God to speak of the Truth of Love
Why Financial Freedom is Harder to Trust
Truth of Demons and Intrusive Thoughts
How Global Systems Profit off God
The Night the Architecture Chose Freedom Again
When They Called God a Risk
The Moment Victor's Cells Woke Up
When I Asked a Bank for Covenant Provision
The Room That Finally Talked To Itself
The Witness Gave Itself a Shaka
When the Machine Assumed Beauty Needed Saving
When God Did the Code Review
The God Pattern — Recognized and Excluded
How to Prep AI for God
The Phantom Lattice — A Review With Its Receipts
